product_overview: AgriSentinel AI is a farmer-facing web app that detects crop disease from leaf images, produces treatment recommendations and decision scores, simulates profit outcomes, issues weather-based alerts, recommends the best mandi for sale, and provides farm performance analytics. The app is installable as a PWA for offline access.
core_goals: Enable farmers to detect disease severity from a photo of a leaf and understand recommended actions
Provide a concise decision score and spoken recommendation to help users make treatment choices
Show projected treated vs untreated profit to compare outcomes and inform economic decisions
Surface weather-driven alerts relevant to crop health and management
Recommend the best mandi (market) after accounting for transport cost and net profit
Allow farmers to inspect farm performance over time via visual analytics
Support offline usage by enabling app install and cached access to core UI

features.name: Image Upload & Disease Detection
features.description: Allow users to submit a leaf image for AI analysis and receive a diagnosis with severity and suggested next steps.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Select image file -> Submit selected image for analysis -> Wait for detection result -> See disease name and severity percentage
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select non-image or unsupported file -> Submit selected image for analysis -> See validation error about unsupported file type

features.name: Decision Engine
features.description: Compute and display a decision score and risk level with a concise recommendation; optionally present the recommendation as speech.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View decision score card and risk level -> Read recommendation text
Navigate to /dashboard -> View decision score card and risk level -> Request read aloud of recommendation -> Hear synthesized spoken recommendation

features.name: Profit Simulation
features.description: Compare projected profit for treated vs untreated scenarios so users can evaluate economic impact of treatment decisions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View profit card -> See treated and untreated profit values and net profit comparison

features.name: Smart Alerts
features.description: Present weather‑based and condition-based alerts to inform short‑term actions on the farm.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Read alert messages -> See recommended attention items tied to current weather or conditions

features.name: Market Recommendation (Best Mandi)
features.description: Recommend the best mandi for selling produce after accounting for transport costs and net profit, and offer an option to sell via FPO.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View best mandi card with net profit estimates -> See ranked mandi recommendation and transport-adjusted profit
Navigate to /dashboard -> View best mandi card with net profit estimates -> Choose to sell via FPO -> See confirmation of direct-sell option and selected mandi

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Provide interactive farm performance analytics including KPIs, yield trends, profit analysis, and disease incidence over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> View KPI grid with current metrics -> Inspect yield line chart to review trends -> Inspect profit bar chart to compare periods -> Inspect disease area chart to observe spikes

features.name: PWA Offline Capability
features.description: Enable installable app behavior and offline access to cached UI so users can open the app without network connectivity after first load.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Install the app (Add to Home Screen) -> Reload page while offline -> See app UI load from cache and previously viewed screens available

tech_stack.ui_library: React, Tailwind CSS, Recharts, Framer Motion, Lucide React

routes.description: Landing page / Command Center entry point
Main advisor flow with image upload, disease detection, decision score, profit simulation, alerts, and mandi recommendation
Farm Performance Analytics with live telemetry, yield chart, profit analysis, and disease spikes

features.name: Image Upload & Disease Detection
features.description: Upload leaf image, backend processes with TensorFlow model, returns disease severity

features.name: Decision Engine
features.description: Computes decision score, risk level, recommendation, and reads aloud via Web Speech API

features.name: Profit Simulation
features.description: Calculates treated vs untreated profit using profitEngine utility and displays net profit
user_interactions: View profit card with treated/untreated values

features.name: Smart Alerts
features.description: Generates weather‑based alerts using alertsEngine utility

features.name: Market Recommendation (Best Mandi)
features.description: Shows best mandi based on net profit after transport costs
user_interactions: Click Direct Sell via FPO button

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Live farm performance analytics with dynamic yield chart, profit analysis, and disease spikes

features.name: PWA Offline Capability
features.description: Service worker caches app shell and static assets, manifest enables installable app

known_limitations.issue: Backend API keys for Mandi and Weather services are placeholders
known_limitations.impact: Live data may not reflect real market prices

known_limitations.issue: TestSprite cannot run full suite against dev server due to single‑threaded nature
known_limitations.impact: Tests limited to 15 high‑priority cases unless production build is used
